commit.name: Weather Card
commit.description: Data display with props, design tokens, and responsive layout
commit.prompt:
Build a weather card component. It should display:
- Current temperature (large, prominent)
- Weather condition with an appropriate icon/emoji (sunny, cloudy, rainy, etc.)
- Humidity percentage
- Wind speed
- A 5-day forecast strip at the bottom showing day name, icon, and high/low temps

All data must come from props — never hardcode weather data. Use CSS variables from the design system for all colors and spacing.

evaluation.critique: The component demonstrates strong adherence to design tokens and proper data handling from props with no hardcoding. Layout is well-structured with appropriate spacing and responsive Row/Stack usage, though the forecast cards could benefit from better horizontal scroll handling on mobile. evaluation.critique: The component has solid data handling and hierarchy, but relies on hardcoded default props (forecast array, city name) when it should only accept prop data. Several inline style properties use raw pixel values (64px, 36px, 8px padding) instead of design tokens, and the forecast items lack hover/focus interactive states despite being visually card-like.
